ItacPersonItem.Notes: There is evidence of epistolary contact between Gallina and the Gonzaga of Sabbioneta (see Ireneo Affo, Vita di Vespasiano Gonzaga, Duca di Sabbioneta e Trajetto (1780), p. 22).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
